description_long: This is a belt-fed, military-style rifle with a robust black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a wooden fixed stock and pistol grip. The rifle features a prominent box magazine mounted beneath the receiver, likely for high-capacity ammunition feeding. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device, and is supported by a bipod for stabilized firing. Iron sights are mounted along the top, with the rear sight near the receiver and the front sight at the muzzle. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible mechanical components such as the charging handle and ejection port. The combination of wood and metal gives it a classic, rugged appearance suitable for urban or combat environments.
description: A belt-fed, military-style rifle with a black metal body, wooden stock and grip, box magazine, bipod, and iron sights. Its robust and utilitarian design features both wood and metal elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, bipod legs, and the narrow profile of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and grip, box magazine, and bipod.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden stock, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, wooden components, and the bipod from the other side.
